title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Heavy Electricals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Heavy Electricals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
